subcodes.first_line: O Pen of Command! Make mention of him who hath been named 'Abdu'l-Ahad, that he may rejoice in the days of his Lord and inhale the fragrance of the garment from [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا قلم الامر ان اذکر من سمی بعبدالاحد لیفرح فی ایام ربه و یجد عرف القمیص من
subcodes.subjects: @rejection, opposition and persecution, @personal instructions, @praise and encouragement
